Switchboard provides permissionless, low-latency oracle data feeds, verifiable randomness, and custom data feeds across multiple blockchains.

## AI Agent Skill: switchboard-agent

End-to-end Switchboard integration playbook covering price feeds, Surge, randomness, and custom feeds, with operating procedures, security checklists, and ready-to-use examples.

→ [SKILL.md](https://docs.switchboard.xyz/ai-agents-llms/switchboard-agent-skill.md)

## Instructions

This file is a routing index. To help users with Switchboard, you MUST:
1. Read the routing table below to identify which product or workflow the user needs.
2. Fetch exactly ONE context file — the single best match for the user's question.

Do NOT attempt to answer using only this file — it does not contain implementation details.
Do NOT fetch all files — each file is self-contained, so only one is needed.

## Routing

If the user needs a **high-level overview or quick start**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-overview.txt

If the user needs help with **pull-based price feeds, on-chain oracle reads, or DeFi integrations**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-price-feeds.txt

If the user needs help with **ultra-low latency data streams, high-frequency trading, or Surge price feeds**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-surge.txt

If the user needs help with **verifiable randomness for games, lotteries, or NFTs**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-randomness.txt

If the user needs help with **building custom feeds, job specs, or task types**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-custom-feeds.txt

If the user needs help with **prediction markets or event-based markets**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-prediction-market.txt

If the user needs help with **x402 micropayments**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-x402.txt

If the user needs help with **running oracles, restaking/NCNs, staking, or protocol operations**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-protocol.txt

If the user needs help with **SDKs, CLI, Crossbar, or other tooling**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-tooling.txt

If the user needs help with **AI agents or programmatic Surge subscriptions**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-ai-agents.txt

If the user needs **definitions or FAQs**:
→ https://docs.switchboard.xyz/llms-reference.txt

## About Switchboard Products

- **Price Feeds**: Pull-based oracle data feeds for on-chain apps.
- **Surge**: Ultra-low latency price feeds for high-frequency use cases.
- **Randomness**: Verifiable randomness for games, lotteries, and on-chain mechanics.
- **Custom Feeds**: Build and deploy your own feeds from any data source.
- **Prediction Market**: Event-based market integrations and examples.
- **X402 Micropayments**: Micropayment flows for on-chain UX.
- **Crossbar & Tooling**: Developer tooling for simulations, updates, and integrations.
- **Protocol & Operators**: TEE-backed oracle protocol, staking/restaking, and node operations.
